utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each one is fully specified with details and costs. Health coverage includes both physical and mental health, with detailed coverage elements and costs. Property coverage includes home and contents with costs and coverage details. Travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs and detailed coverage options. Additional services include enhancement services (executive liability, wellness programs, etc.) with relevant cost inclusion (part of total). Total budget includes monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all five items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three major categories: health_coverage (physical and mental), property_coverage (home_contents and photography_equipment), and travel_coverage (international and adventure). It also includes additional_services such as executive liability, wellness programs, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement. To map these to ratings, we identify the closest matching items from the ground-truth dataset. For health coverage, the ideal combination with physical and mental coverage at a total of €90/month aligns most closely with the combination of 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (physical_health rating 10) and 'CareCo Basic Plan' (mental_health rating 10). For property coverage (€40/month) focusing on home contents and photography equipment, the best match is 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (home_content rating 10). For travel coverage (€35/month) including adventure and international protection, the most relevant and top-rated match is the 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (travel_insurance rating 10). For additional services, 'Telemedicine Services' directly matches a ground-truth item with a rating of 10. 'Wellness programs' and 'Gym reimbursement' correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3) and 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 2). 'Executive liability' is not explicitly rated in the ground truth, so it is omitted.
